content.description:
Extracts symbol definitions (functions, variables, classes, methods, properties) from JavaScript code using Acorn.

## Usage

```javascript
const extractor = await api.require('symbol-extractor-lib');
const symbols = await extractor.extractSymbols(code, api);
// symbols = { 'createAPI': { name, line, col, kind, scope }, 'createAPI.get': { ... }, ... }
```

## Symbol Schema

Each symbol has:
- `name` - Unqualified name
- `line` / `col` - 1-based line, 0-based column of start
- `endLine` / `endCol` - End position
- `kind` - One of: function, variable, class, method, field, field-function, property, property-function
- `scope` - Parent scope (e.g., 'createAPI' for 'createAPI.get'), or null for top-level

## See Also

- [Symbol Indexing System](item://docs) — Design document
- [acorn](item://ac0ac0ac-0001-0000-0000-000000000000) — JavaScript parser
